name: Tiramisu
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 9 x 1 pan.
2. Line the pan with slices of custard cake.
3. Drizzle perked coffee over the slices of cake.
4. Spoon half the vanilla pudding over the cake.
5. Cover the pudding with remaining slices of cake.
6. Drizzle coffee again over the cake.
7. Top with remaining instant pudding.
